MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter C. Catalanotti, Esq., of Manning & Kass, Tel. 415.217.6990, appearing for Defendant and moving party,
James B. Kraus, Esq., of Zacks & Freedman, Tel. 415.956.8100, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS STANLEY T. SMALLWOOD and BOARDWALK INVESTMENT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied. There are triable issues whether there were any misrepresentations made regarding the elevator. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric S. Vanderpool, Esq., of ReedSmith LLP, Tel. 415.659.5928, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
James B. Kraus, Esq., of Zacks & Freedman, Tel. 415.956.8100, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and FREDERICK SCHIFFERLE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Denied. There are triable issues whether there were any misrepresentations made regarding the elevator and whether defendants had an intent to deceive the plaintiffs. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA N.A. AKA U.S. TRUST BANK OF AMERICA, IN ITS CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE, AND FREDERICK SCHIFFERLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO SCHIFFERLE IF PLAINTIFFS CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH FACTS MAKING HIM PERSONALLY LIABLE AND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 4 AS TO THE BANK FOR PLAINTIFFS TO PLEAD THE ALLEGED FRAUD WITH THE REQUISITE SPECIFICITY, BUT OVERRULED AS TO THE BANK AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 3. =301/PJB
